The classification of Cryptophoranthus maculatus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Liliopsida. intro: Cryptophoranthus maculatus, also known as the spotted calathea or spotted cryptanthus, is a type of bromeliad plant that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. The health benefits of C. maculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, burns, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, C. maculatus is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are commonly used to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues.
